title: NZ Government Cloud First Policy
description: New Zealand government's mandatory cloud-first policy requiring public sector organisations to adopt public cloud services for information systems unless specific exceptions apply. Covers data classification requirements, multi-cloud strategies, cost optimization, risk assessment, and sustainability considerations.
